title: Uploading files to your Galaxy Trakr account using FileZilla

guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"lm4r","text":"It can only be used if your organization allows the use of the FileZilla client. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Click on File and select site manager .
Click on New site and name it as you desire.
In p rotocol from the dropdown menu select SFTP - SHH... Then in Host: upload.galaxytrakr.org
Select the type of login. If you select normal, add your user name and your password , and you will not have to enter it again when you want to connect to it.
Click connect and you will be shown on the far right the window with your Galaxy Trakr data available via FTP.

Now you are ready to transfer any data from your computer or any other drive to your Galaxy Trakr account. Just drag the selected files on the lower left window left. Dragging the files Transferring the files
Check that the files are available at your Genome Trakr account by clicking upload and FTP in your Galaxy Trakr account.
The files are in your account and can be fetched to the Galaxy Trakr website and start performing your analyzes.
creator: Narjol Gonzalez-Escalona
